series_metadata.series_title: Copies of manifests from Ohio hazardous waste generators.
series_metadata.series_description: Some Ohio hazardous waste generators send a copy of the hazardous waste manifest to Ohio EPA because they sent their hazardous waste to a hazardous waste facility in Ohio and they think they need to send a copy of the manifest to the destination state. These copies are considered unsolicited copies of manifests from Ohio hazardous waste generators.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 1 year or until no longer of use, then destroy., Paper: Recycle
